Fix this Rust code from `src/lib.rs`:

```rust
pub fn sum_even(values: &[i32]) -> i32 {
    values
        .iter()
        .copied()
        .filter(|value| value % 2 == 0)
        .sum()
```

The snippet is missing its final closing brace. Restoring the brace fixes the block structure.

```rust
pub fn sum_even(values: &[i32]) -> i32 {
    values
        .iter()
        .copied()
        .filter(|value| value % 2 == 0)
        .sum()
}
```
